description: Create a technical residential plumbing plan for a bathroom renovation using Wondershare EdrawMax. The plan must feature a 10 ft x 8 ft room containing a toilet, shower, and sink, with a water heater positioned nearby. Route color-coded piping lines as follows: blue for cold water connecting the water heater to the toilet, sink, and shower; red for hot water connecting the water heater to the sink and shower only; and black or green for waste/drainage from all three fixtures to a main stack. Include text labels for all fixtures and piping systems. Save the project to /home/ga/Diagrams/bathroom_plumbing_plan.eddx and export the diagram as an image to /home/ga/Diagrams/bathroom_plumbing_plan.png.
